an exquisite corpse

A triptych performance of poetry, video, and dance with Althea Baird and mallika singh. For closing ceremony of the exhibition, Exquisite Corpse, curated and installed by Matthan Cowart. The night of readings was hosted by Prrroblem Press.

  • Dec 14, 2025
  • Desert Mystery Centery
  • performance
